loop_goal: Turn repeated communication and release-planning pain into a bounded V4 improvement loop.

active_workers.current_task: Collected repeated communication and planning pain from workspace feedback.
Routed repeated pain into problem, idea, and next-stage planning paths.
Prepare the next bounded V4 slice for docs and the auto-improvement loop.

review_gate.exit_condition: The proposed fix must directly address the observed PM communication and planning pain.

validation_gate.exit_condition: The fix must reduce manual rewrite and planning translation work relative to the prior baseline.

pm_decision_gate.exit_condition: The PM must accept, defer, or reject the proposed next bounded slice.

next_recommended_action: Approve the next bounded V4 slice for publishing metadata, doc freshness hardening, and the automated improvement loop.
